MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-11-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANTS LUCIANA GALLINA AND GALLINA FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL HELD. AFTER THE MATTER WAS PASSED FOR PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER ON A NEW TRIAL DATE, THE COURT CONTINUED THE TRIAL FROM 1/14/13 TO 2/28/13 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. MEDIATION IS TO OCCUR BY 1/30/13 AND PAID FOR BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXTENSION OF THE DISCOVERY DEADLINE EXCEPT EXPERT DISCLOSURES AS STIPULATED BY THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED. (AFTER THE HEARING, THE PARTIES WERE ASKED TO SUBMIT AN AMENDED PROPOSED ORDER WITH ANOTHER AGREED DATE THAT IS SET ON A MONDAY.) JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
